title: Coding with ADK to beat a text adventure game
summary: Google Cloud Tech livestream featuring the Agent Development Kit (ADK) being used to solve a text adventure game. Speakers Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar demonstrated coding with ADK for game-playing agents.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech livestream demonstrates using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to build agents that play and solve a text adventure game. Hosts Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar code live, showing how ADK structures an agent capable of acting on the game. The concrete takeaway is a practical look at ADK applied to a self-contained, game-playing task rather than a discussion of agents in the abstract.
